description: Open /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan.dxf and add fire alarm system components. Create a 'FIRE-ALARM-DEVICES' layer (red, color index 1) containing four smoke detector circles (radius 8) at (120, 180), (360, 180), (120, 380), and (360, 380); a Fire Alarm Control Panel (FACP) rectangle at (220, 30) with width 40 and height 25; and text labels (height 10) 'SD-1' at (130, 190), 'SD-2' at (370, 190), 'SD-3' at (130, 390), 'SD-4' at (370, 390), and 'FACP' at (225, 60). Create a 'FIRE-ALARM-WIRING' layer (yellow, color index 2) with two polylines: Run 1 connecting (240, 55), (120, 55), (120, 180), and (120, 380); and Run 2 connecting (240, 55), (360, 55), (360, 180), and (360, 380). Save the result to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan_fire_alarm.dxf.
